nodes.summary: macOS menu bar tray controller with session/approval/usage display and animated activity icon

nodes.label: tray activity indicator
nodes.summary: macOS tray icon with idle/unseen/busy states, animated breath frames, numeric titles for approvals/errors

nodes.label: tray session list
nodes.summary: Tray menu lists active sessions with status icons, project/branch subtitle, click to focus

hyperedges.label: Tray Presentation System
hyperedges.summary: macOS menu bar tray integration: animated activity indicator icon, pending approval actions with Allow/Deny, active session list with click-to-focus, usage submenu
